def modify_features(df_input) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """
    Thought 1: The absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight can capture the imbalance in weight distribution.
    New Feature 1: weight_difference | weight_difference = abs(Left-Weight - Right-Weight)
    """
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    """
    Thought 1: The absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight can capture the imbalance in weight distribution.
    Thought 2: The ratio of the absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight to the sum of Left-Weight and Right-Weight might better capture the weight imbalance.
    Thought 3: Combining categorical features (weight imbalance and distance balance) to determine the most likely weight configuration on the scale might improve prediction performance.
    Thought 4: Using the logarithm of weight imbalance to focus on lower weight imbalance might help in prediction.
    Thought 5: Using the sigmoid function of the absolute difference between the left and right weight to map it to a probability might help in prediction.
    New Feature 1: weight_difference = abs(Left-Weight - Right-Weight)
    New Feature 2: weight_difference_ratio = weight_difference / (Left-Weight + Right-Weight)
    New Feature 3: combined_weight_config = np.where((weight_imbalance < 0.4) & (distance_balance > 0.3), 'left-heavy', np.where((weight_imbalance > 0.6) & (distance_balance < 0.2), 'right-heavy', 'balanced'))
    New Feature 4: log_weight_imbalance = np.log(weight_imbalance + 1)
    New Feature 5: sigmoid_weight_difference = 1 / (1 + np.exp(-weight_difference))
    
    """
    df_output = df_input.copy()
    
    # Calculate weight difference
    df_output['weight_difference'] = abs(df_output['Left-Weight'] - df_output['Right-Weight'])

    # Calculate weight difference ratio
    df_output['weight_difference_ratio'] = df_output['weight_difference'] / (df_output['Left-Weight'] + df_output['Right-Weight'])

    # Combine categorical and numerical features to determine the most likely weight configuration on the scale
    df_output['combined_weight_config'] = np.where((df_output['weight_imbalance'] < 0.4) & (df_output['distance_balance'] > 0.3), 'left-heavy', np.where((df_output['weight_imbalance'] > 0.6) & (df_output['distance_balance'] < 0.2), 'right-heavy', 'balanced'))
